summary: Tested MT5 Quant Supervision dashboard (backend + frontend). 17/17 backend pytest cases passed including KPIs, accounts, equity, drawdown, trades w/ filters, kill switch toggle, risk limits update with GET-verified persistence, alerts CRUD and /api/sim/tick. Frontend dashboard loads cleanly, KPI ticker shows all metrics, 8 accounts render with status badges, default ACC-001 auto-selected, clicking ACC-002 updates Risk/Equity/Drawdown/Trades panels (verified ACC-002 text in risk header), Recharts SVGs render in equity-panel and drawdown-panel with dd-max & dd-current visible, trades side filter (BUY) narrowed rows to 48, kill switch toggles LIVE<->PAUSED text correctly, risk limits save persists input value 3.7, alert ACK individual + alert-ack-all both present and functional, refresh button triggers /api/sim/tick. UI matches Bloomberg/TradingView dark trading-terminal aesthetic with monospace numbers and proper green/red P&L coloring.
critical_code_review_comments: RiskPanel.jsx: when account prop updates from parent (e.g. after refresh), local `limits` useState is initialized only once. Because Dashboard re-keys RiskPanel by account.id, this works for account switches but NOT after /api/sim/tick refreshes — saved limits don't re-sync from server. Consider using `useEffect(() => setLimits(account.risk_limits), [account.risk_limits])`.
Dashboard.jsx: `selectedId: state.selectedId || (action.accounts[0]?.id ?? null)` uses falsy check; if user ever deselects (id=null) on a future feature it will auto re-select first account.
TradesTable sort comparator does string/number comparison without type coercion — works for current data but fragile if backend returns mixed types.

Backend server.py: ACCOUNTS and ALERTS are in-memory module-level state; reloading the server resets all kill-switch/risk-limit overrides. Acceptable for MVP but should be documented or persisted to Mongo in next iteration.
Backend /api/sim/tick uses non-deterministic `random.Random()` (no seed) which is fine for live simulation but causes flaky test thresholds — chose to assert only schema/keys in test.
No data-testid on equity-panel/drawdown-panel children for individual data points; current testids on dd-max/dd-current are sufficient for the MVP.
seed_data_creation: None — mock data generated server-side on startup (deterministic seed=7).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_mt5_api.py covers all 11 endpoints. UI loads at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL with all required data-testids exposed. The 'REFRESHING…' transient button label was not captured in 300ms polling window because the tick+load round-trip completes very fast; the disabled-state and logic are correct — no fix needed. RiskPanel does not resync local input state on parent refresh (see code review).
